evidence: Fallback state capture proved the runtime bug even though LLDB could not launch in this environment. For wraps_negative_int, ReadVarint32 decoded 2147483648, which narrowed to -2147483648 at ReadString(int); for all_bits_set, 4294967295 narrowed to -1. ReadString then returned false without advancing CurrentPosition() or changing BytesUntilLimit(), so the signed-state bug is real but downstream guards prevented memory corruption in this path.
